prose.title: 35l mos
prose.body: The 35L Military Occupational Specialty (MOS) is the Counterintelligence (CI) Agent MOS in the U.S. Army. As a 35L CI Agent, your primary responsibility is to provide counterintelligence support and expertise to senior commanders and their staff. This includes collecting and analyzing intelligence information, conducting investigations, and providing advice on security and counterintelligence matters. You may also be involved in conducting screenings, debriefings, and interrogations, as well as participating in CI source operations and assisting with tactical and strategic CI operations. It's a critical MOS that helps protect the U.S. military against threats from foreign intelligence entities.
